strengths: Strong SQL and complex query skills (CTEs, window functions)
Proven dashboarding and visualization (Power BI, Tableau)
ETL and data pipeline development with Python
Quantified impact on operations and KPIs
weaknesses: No dbt or Looker Studio Pro projects listed
Leadership presentation examples fewer than requested (mentions but not 5+)
Unclear years in some required tools (exact Excel/Sheets advanced formulas usage)
improvement_bullets: Collaborated with senior leadership to define KPIs for insurance testing data, presenting 5+ analytical reports to Directors to drive project strategy and resource allocation.
Engineered scalable data models and workflows using dbt and SQL to transform complex, multi-source insurance datasets into clean, actionable schemas for downstream analysis.
Migrated legacy reporting to Looker and Looker Studio Pro, enhancing self-service capabilities for non-technical stakeholders and standardizing metrics across the business.
Analyzed patient utilization and service operations data to identify inefficiencies, providing actionable insights for process improvements in a manner consistent with healthcare quality standards.
Managed full-cycle Git workflows for collaborative code development, ensuring documentation standards and version control compliance for sensitive operational data projects.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Associate, Operations Data Analytics opportunity with Oscar Health. I am interested in this opportunity because of Oscar’s reputation for using a full-stack technology platform to simplify the health insurance experience, creating a 'doctor in the family' level of care for its members. What interests me about working for Oscar is its relentless focus on member-centric operations and the commitment to driving data-informed decisions in the complex healthcare landscape. I believe my expertise in advanced SQL data modeling and my ability to translate complex technical findings into actionable business narratives would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a systematic focus on operational efficiency. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in client onboarding and utilized Python and Zapier to automate workflows, which saved 8 hours per week and allowed the team to focus on high-value customer acquisition, resulting in a 300% increase in new customers over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Associate, Operations Data Analytics role at Oscar would allow me to bring my deep technical experience in SQL and data visualization to your Service Operations team. Additionally, my experience at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my stakeholder management and presentation skills. During a critical insurance testing project, I collaborated with Underwriting and Product teams to align software features with business objectives, presenting findings to stakeholders that reduced project delivery delays by 25%. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and data architecture in working on healthcare-specific utilization metrics at Oscar. I know that my analytical rigor and communication style align with what it takes to succeed at the Associate, Operations Data Analytics role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
